{{Infobox character
| name = Ilana
| appears_in = The Traveler's Gate Trilogy
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

''See also: [[Ilana Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|Ilana is a twenty-year-old woman from [[Myria]] who possesses a strong sense of humor and a hardworking nature rooted in her background on a farm. She is the sister of [[Simon]] and has spent months monitoring [[Alin]]'s activities. Despite having lost her fiancé during a military raid on her home, she maintains a resilient personality. Driven by a sense of responsibility toward her family's actions, she joins a journey with the promise of eventually returning to her starting point. During her travels, she has demonstrated combat capability using a golden wooden bow and specialized arrows to strike targets such as golems. At one point, she was severely injured by the [[Incarnation]], leaving her in a critical state of survival.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|As a companion and member of [[Alin]]'s traveling party, Ilana traveled alongside her brother. During an encounter with the [[Naraka Incarnation]], she was violently spilled to the ground. Following this event, [[Alin]] was forced to search for her and eventually found her so that he could carry her.}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Ilana]] is a companion of [[Alin]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Ilana]] is part of [[Alin]]'s party.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c23">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 23</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The [[Naraka Incarnation]] spilled [[Ilana]] to the ground.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 24</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] needs to find [[Ilana]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c24" />}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Alin]] was carrying [[Ilana]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 25</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Ilana]] is [[Alin]]'s sister.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c25" />}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Ilana]]'s family caused the current situation.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Alin]] wants to rescue [[Ilana]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c15">''City of Light'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Ilana]] is facing the [[Ragnarus Incarnation]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c27">''City of Light'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"He was sitting between Shai and Ilana, tearing into a roast pork sandwich..."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
